phase_raw.during:
action = update_fields
            				workflow status = true
            				visible fields = [Rejection_Reason]

action = update_fields
            				workflow status = true
            				visible fields = [Supplier_From_Section,Reject_Section,Total_Section,Monthly_Rental,Internet_Charges,Call_Charges]

transitions.display_name: Payment Received Full from Partially Paid
Due Date Passed from Partially Paid

phase_raw.before:
transition owner
            				(
                				permissions = {"Administrator", "Finance Manager"}
             				)
            				confirmation before execution
            				(
                				message = "This invoice is approved but LHDN e-invoice data is incomplete (missing Invoice UUID or public link). Revert ${Invoice_No} to Pending Approval so it can be corrected and approved again?"
                				confirm button text = "Yes, Revert"
                				cancel button text = "Cancel"
            				)
            				transition criteria = (Invoice_UUID is null || QR_Invoice_Public_Link is null)
